node.text: Jolene has started using a bullet journal as a time management strategy to track tasks and stay organized.

node.text: Jolene designed notebooks inspired by her love for space and engines with elements like galaxies and circuitry.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "journal track tasks organized") on Session 16 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Jolene uses the Pomodoro Technique - 25 minutes work, 5-minute break - to avoid burnout.
